title: Document the one-liner install + deploy in README
userStory: As Steve, I want the curl one-liner front and centre in the README so that future-me does not have to read the install script to remember how to use it.
acceptanceCriteria: README.md gains a 'Deploy to a VPS' section near the top

Section shows the exact `curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/<user>/brainbot/main/bin/install.sh | bash` command with a one-paragraph caveat about reading the script first when piping curl to bash
Section documents the env vars the install script will prompt for and which ones can be pre-set
Section documents the update path: `ssh vps 'cd /opt/brainbot && bin/deploy.sh'`
Section links to the compose/.env.example for the canonical env var list
